mapper.sql: id, notice_type, title, content, cover_file_id, attachment_json, status, top_flag, publisher_org_id, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM biz_notice WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_notice ( notice_type, title, content, cover_file_id, attachment_json, status, top_flag, publisher_org_id, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{noticeType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverFileId}, #{attachmentJson}, #{status}, #{topFlag}, #{publisherOrgId}, #{publishTime}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_notice SET notice_type = #{noticeType}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, cover_file_id = #{coverFileId}, attachment_json = #{attachmentJson}, top_flag = #{topFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_notice SET status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_notice SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT n.id) FROM biz_notice n INNER JOIN biz_notice_scope ns ON n.id = ns.notice_id WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
AND n.notice_type = #{query.noticeType}
AND ( ns.scope_type = 'ALL' OR ns.scope_ref_id = #{userOrgId} OR #{ancestorPath} LIKE CONCAT('%/', ns.scope_ref_id, '/%') )
